betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Endgame Armor: HEV (Hazard Encapsulated Vest)§f

§aHEV Armor is the radiation-hardened suit for QMD endgame operations.§f
The §bHEV (Hazard Encapsulated Vest)§f is QMD's top-tier armor set, providing §bradiation shielding§f, §bexotic-matter containment protection§f, and §bbuilt-in power§f for use around antimatter cells, decay chambers, and vacuum chambers. The quest is gated on obtaining the §bHEV Helmet§f (`qmd:helm_hev`); the other pieces (chest, legs, boots) have the same recipe pattern.

§6HEV Helmet Recipe (graph: `minecraft.crafting` + `zmaster587.AR.chemicalReactor`)§f:
Per the crafting recipe (per JEI graph):
- Input 1: §bSuper Alloy Ingot§f (`qmd:ingot_alloy:6`)
- Input 2: §bLithium Ion Cell§f (`nuclearcraft:lithium_ion_cell`) — built-in power
- Input 3: §bHeavy Radiation Shielding§f (`nuclearcraft:rad_shielding:2`)
- Input 4: §bBoron Nitride Helmet§f (`nuclearcraft:helm_boron_nitride`)
- Input 5: §bElite Processor§f (`qmd:semiconductor:6`)
- Input 6: §bPipe Seal§f (`advancedrocketry:pipesealer`) — added via Advanced Rocketry Chemical Reactor recipe

§6HEV Set Pieces§f:
The HEV armor set is themed around QMD's accelerator visuals (white-and-yellow hazmat suit):
- §bHEV Helmet§f (`qmd:helm_hev`)
- §bHEV Chestplate§f (`qmd:chest_hev`) — the §bquest icon§f
- §bHEV Leggings§f (`qmd:legs_hev`)
- §bHEV Boots§f (`qmd:boots_hev`)

All four pieces share the same recipe pattern (different armor base for the chest/legs/boots).

§6Component Supply Chain§f:
- §bSuper Alloy Ingot§f → from §bNC Alloy Furnace§f using §bSuper Alloy Dust§f blends.
- §bLithium Ion Cell§f → from §bNC Manufactory§f using §bLithium§f, §bManganese Dioxide§f, etc.
- §bHeavy Radiation Shielding§f → high-tier §bNC Radiation Shielding§f (level 3).
- §bBoron Nitride Helmet§f → mid-tier §bNC Hazmat§f helmet; precursor is §bBoron§f + §bNC Manufactory§f.
- §bElite Processor§f → from §bAdvanced Processor§f + §bBSCCO Wire§f + Hafnium + Platinum (QMDRecipes.java:505).
- §bPipe Seal§f → from §bAdvanced Rocketry Chemical Reactor§f.

§6Armor Function§f:
- §bRadiation shielding§f: protects the player from §bgamme-ray bursts§f emitted by antimatter detonations and §b§f§cbright radiation§f§f§c§f from running accelerators.
- §bAntimatter safe handling§f: reduces the chance of detonation if a filled antimatter cell is dropped while wearing HEV.
- §bBuilt-in power§f: the §bLithium Ion Cell§f slot provides §bFE storage§f for the suit.
- §b§f§c§fHazmat tier§f§c§f§c§f: matches the §bNC Boron Nitride§f hazmat tier for chemical and biological protection.

§cWarning§f: HEV Armor does §cnot§f make you §cimmune§f to antimatter detonations. The §b§f§cElite Processor§f§c§f§c§f is the §ccritical§f component for the §b§f§csuit's fail-safes§f§c§f§c§f — without it, the suit is just heavy plating.

§eTip§f: Before you commit to HEV Armor production, set up a §cstable pipeline§f for §bElite Processor§f, §bLithium Ion Cell§f, and §bHeavy Radiation Shielding§f. The HEV set is the §b§f§cmost expensive armor set§f§c§f§c§f in QMD and is not consumed by use — invest in one full set, not partial.
